holdings.n: Deposits With Broker For Short Positions

overview.description: The Innovator Equity Dual Directional 15 Buffer ETF - April (DDFA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to make money in both positive and negative markets, on a limited basis, over a one-year period starting in April. The fund uses FLEX options based on the price return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF. DDFA was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by Innovator.
